acceptance.assertion: Each Captain action is explicitly marked high-impact.
Recovery or irreversibility is recorded before mutation.
Target changes require an explicit target-change record.

goal: Add explicitly marked Captain paths for merge, deploy, service restart, fleet mutation, and cleanup apply with recovery/irreversibility receipts.
